title: StijnMarsepijn's Mace Trainer
description: A pack that optimizes mace and other PvP
body:
This Minecraft 1.21 PvP setup is all about performance, visibility, and zero distractions. On the mod side, Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast handle the heavy lifting, giving high FPS and stable gameplay even in stacked fights. EntityCulling, MoreCulling, and BadOptimizations reduce unnecessary rendering, which really helps during crystal PvP. Speaking of that, End Crystal Optimizer and Marlow’s Crystal Optimizer make explosions smoother and more consistent.

For combat awareness, mods like TotemCounter, Ukus’ Armor HUD, Durability Tooltip, AppleSkin, and Status Effect Timer keep essential info visible without clutter. BetterF3, Zoomify, Sodium Extra, and Reese’s Sodium Options let you fine-tune visuals while keeping everything readable. Extras like Dynamic FPS, PingView, Fast IP Ping, Essential, and Simple Voice Chat improve the overall multiplayer experience.

The resource packs push visibility even further. Low Fire, Low Shield, Small Shield & Totem, and Shorter Swords reduce screen blockage. No Explosion Particles and No Block Break Particles remove visual spam. PvP Crosshair, Visible Shield Cooldown, Smaller Totem Pops, and the 3D Crystal pack give clear combat feedback. Overall, it’s a sharp, competitive setup built to win fights, not look fancy.
